query:
SELECT 
  id,
  customerName,
  salesPerson,
  classDate,
  LEFT(notes, 200) as notes_preview
FROM orders 
WHERE createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE)
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute 
SELECT 
  id,
  customerName,
  salesPerson,
  classDate,
  LEFT(notes, 200) as notes_preview
FROM orders 
WHERE createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE)
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 5;
